paper.title: Characterization of recycled aggregates construction and demolition waste for concrete production following the Spanish Structural Concrete Code EHE-08
paper.authors: M. Martín-Morales; M. Zamorano; A. Ruiz-Moyano; I. Valverde-Espinosa
paper.notes: Aggregate characterization paper; supplied tables contain aggregate properties, not concrete compressive-strength results.

evidence.evidence_text: Aggregate characterization paper; supplied tables contain aggregate properties, not concrete compressive-strength results.
